chapter_title.ar: بَابٌ فِي أَنَّ التَّوَاخِيَ لَمْ يَقَعْ عَلَى الدِّينِ وَ إِنَّمَا هُوَ التَّعَارُفُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 74 – Regarding, that the brotherhood does not yet occur upon the Religion, and rather it is the recognition (of Al Wilayah)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (26/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (26/ 9)
text: لَمْ تَتَوَاخَوْا عَلَى هَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَ إِنَّمَا تَعَارَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Ibn Muskan, and Sama’at, altogether,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘You are not yet establishing brotherhood upon this matter (Al-Wilayah), but rather you are being recognised upon it’.
en.sarwar: 2. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from ibn Muskan and Sama’a all from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “You have not become brothers on the basis of this matter (Walayah the belief of the Shi’a Muslims); it is only that you have recognized each other by means of Walayah .”
